summary: Full Application Test (Iteration 9) - DVF, PDF Export, CRM Removal. All 22 backend tests passed. Frontend fully functional with DVF prices, PDF export button, and CRM correctly removed from navigation.
passed_tests: GET /api/dvf/commune/62193 returns Pas-de-Calais data with prix_median_m2=45
GET /api/dvf/commune/13055 returns Bouches-du-Rhône data with prix_median_m2=120
GET /api/dvf/region/PACA returns aggregated data with departements list
GET /api/france/parcelles/bbox includes dvf_prix_median_m2, dvf_prix_q1_m2, dvf_prix_q3_m2 fields
POST /api/export/pdf with parcel data returns valid PDF (Content-Type: application/pdf, starts with %PDF)
POST /api/export/pdf/dc-site with valid site_id returns PDF
GET /api/map/electrical-assets returns postes with S3REnR data
POST /api/dc/search with PACA returns scored results
POST /api/chat with '50MW en PACA' returns search_results
Dashboard loads with COCKPIT IMMO header
Layers toggle button visible with all layer options
S3REnR summary panel visible in sidebar with 3 regions
Legend visible with S3REnR status colors
Chatbot panel opens on click with input and send button
Chatbot returns search results (5 results for '50MW en PACA')
Table view loads with PLU column
GPT Agent page (/gpt-agent) loads with setup instructions
ParcelDetail panel opens when clicking parcel
DVF text visible in ParcelDetail (Prix DVF €/m², Transactions DVF)
CRM NOT in mobile nav (correctly removed)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - uses dvf_data.py for DVF prices, dc_search_api.py for sites
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full app test completed. New features: 1) DVF endpoints at /api/dvf/commune/{code} and /api/dvf/region/{region} return price data from dvf_data.py. 2) PDF export at /api/export/pdf and /api/export/pdf/dc-site using reportlab. 3) CRM removed from both desktop and mobile navigation. ParcelDetail shows DVF section when parcel has dvf_prix_median_m2 > 0. PDF export button has data-testid=export-pdf-btn. All previous features (S3REnR, chatbot, GPT agent, DC search) still working.

dvf_endpoints.region: /api/dvf/region/{region} - returns aggregated data with departements list

pdf_export.parcel: POST /api/export/pdf - accepts parcel JSON, returns PDF

crm_removed.desktop_nav: No CRM tab in desktop navigation
crm_removed.mobile_nav: No CRM tab in mobile bottom navigation

frontend_verification.parcel_detail_dvf: DVF section shows when parcel has dvf_prix_median_m2 > 0
frontend_verification.s3renr_summary: data-testid=s3renr-summary shows 3 regions (IDF SATURE, PACA ACTIF, HdF ACTIF)
